text: When do you pay bills?
options: ["Pay immediately","Pay by due date","Pay when we get around to them"]

text: How should we pay utilities?
options: ["Split costs evenly","Separate utility expenses (e.g. One pays for electricity, one pays for internet)"]

text: What are your thoughts on sharing and borrowing?
options: ["Let’s share everything, no need to ask","You can probably borrow my stuff, just ask first","I won’t say no in an emergency (I prefer to not share)","Sorry, I don’t ever lend my stuff to others"]

text: How should we share common-use items?
options: ["Take turns buying","Split costs evenly","Buy our own items separately"]

text: How should we share common food items?
options: ["Take turns buying","Split costs evenly","Buy our own items separately","Split costs for common meals, buy the rest separately"]

text: How tidy do you keep shared spaces?
options: ["Could eat off the floor","Everything is tidy","Slightly messy","Where's the floor?"]

text: What’s your bathroom like?
options: ["Spotlessly clean - daily tidy","Pretty good - weekly clean","Not bad - monthly clean","Not sure - no cleaning products"]

text: What’s your kitchen like?
options: ["Always sparkling clean","Clean and mostly tidy","Good luck finding stuff","Salmonella’s best friend"]

text: How do you handle dishes?
options: ["Washed, put away daily","Washed, dry overnight","Wash in morning after overnight soak","Wash only when everything else is dirty"]

text: How will we handle cleaning?
options: ["Rotate cleaning assignment","Permanent cleaning assignment","Decide when need for cleaning arises"]

text: How often will you do your share of cleaning?
options: ["Daily","Weekly","Bi-weekly","Once a month","When desired"]

text: Preferred Housing
options: ["House only","House or apartment only","Dorm is ok"]

text: Room sharing
options: ["I am willing to share a room with bunk beds if it brings costs down","A shared room with enough space for 2 separate beds is ok","I will not share a room"]

text: Shared space
options: ["I'm fine if all main  rooms are used as bedrooms (Only the kitchen and bathroom are shared)","There needs to be at least one common living room","There needs to be at least a dining room and living room"]

text: Do you smoke?
options: ["Yes","Yes, but never in the house","No"]

text: Does smoking bother you?
options: ["Yes","I don't mind if you smoke only outside of the house","No"]

text: Do you or will you have pets?
options: ["Dog","Cat","Other furry critter","Fur-less critter","None"]

text: Do you mind pets?
options: ["All pets are fine","Dogs are fine","Cats are fine","Other furry critters are ok","Fur-less critters are ok","I don’t want pets around"]

text: When do you go to bed during the week?
options: ["Early: between 8pm – 11pm","Moderate: between 11pm – 1am","Late: between 1am – 4am","During daylight hours"]

text: How often will you be coming and going?
options: ["I’ll be home 24/7","Once or twice per day","Constantly"]

text: When is noise acceptable?
options: ["Any time of day or night","During the day and evening, but not at night","During the daytime only please","I need the silence of a library"]

text: How often do you have music on?
options: ["Always!","Often","Rarely","Never"]

text: What’s the volume like?
options: ["Shakes the floor","Comfortable listening level","Quiet, background level","I use headphones"]

text: Study habits?
options: ["Must be completely quiet","Some distractions are ok","Usually study elsewhere","Who needs to study?"]

text: What are you hoping for from me as a roommate?
options: ["Someone to split the bills and chores","Great if we are friends, but we don't have to","Someone friendly, but don’t have to be best friends","Someone who wants to hang out and do stuff with"]

text: Will anyone else be living with us?
helperText: If you picked "Other" and want to specify, use the final free text question.
options: ["No","Yes, my partner","Yes, my family (w/kids)","Yes – Other"]

text: What’s your guest policy?
options: ["The more the merrier! Guests all the time","Not a problem, just ask for a heads up","One or two guests are okay occasionally","On a rare occasion guests are fine","I prefer no guests coming over"]

text: How do you feel about guests spending the night?
options: ["Doesn’t bother me","Occasionally is fine, but not multiple nights","Guests staying over regularly is fine","I’m not comfortable with guests staying over"]

text: Will any guests be staying over?
options: ["I have a guest who will stay over frequently (3+ x/week)","I have a guest who will stay over occasionally (<3x)","Rarely (once to twice a month)","I do not anticipate any guests staying over"]

text: How do you feel about parties?
options: ["Love them, I’d host every week if I could!","They’re fine, just provide notice ahead of time","An occasional dinner/small gathering is fine","I don’t want to have any parties at my home"]

text: Do you have any food allergies?
helperText: If you picked Yes and want to specify, use the final free text question.

text: Anything about food your roommates should know?
helperText: If you picked "Other" and want to specify, use the final free text question.
options: ["I’m vegetarian/vegan but meat can be in the house","I’m vegetarian/vegan and meat can’t be in the house","I’m Kosher","I’m Halal","Other"]

text: How often do you cook?
options: ["All three meals, most days","Usually dinners","One or two big meals a week","Pretty much never"]

text: How do you feel about alcohol?
options: ["I’m game for drinks during the week","I save it for the weekends","I drink a few times a month","I don’t drink, but I don’t mind if you do","I don’t drink, and I’d like an alcohol-free home"]

text: Anything else your room mates should know?
helperText: Anything you think your future room mate(s) should know, related to the previous questions or not.
